text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I pay a visit to a shrine with Taiki Shuttle.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We made it to the shrine! It's so quiet and
peaceful!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Woiya, woiya! Hoiya, hoiya!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Namu, namu! Woiya, hoiya! Come ooon, great
fortune!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, Fukukitaru! Whatcha doin'?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello there, Taiki! I was just praying for great
fortune!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You see, I've received a divine charge from the
great Shiraoki. I must pull "great fortune" on a
fortune slip at the shrine.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Why don't you join me and try your luck, Taiki?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, fortune slips! That got something to do with
the fortune-telling stuff you're always goin' on
about?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I love when ya tell me 'bout all that! It's awful fun!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I wanna try pullin' in a whole mess of happiness!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oho, you are known for spreading happiness! With you around, I'm sure to get great fortune!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's go! Fortune, come our way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ahoooyyy! Bring on the fortune!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Great fortune, pretty please! All right, let's give
this a go!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, look! I really got me a "great fortune"
slip!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yippee! I like this fortune slip pullin' thing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: H-how come Taiki drew "great fortune" and I pulled "great mis fortune"?! What is happening?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No! Don't give up, Fukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If you draw a ton of 'em, I'm sure you'll get "great
fortune" eventually!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Taiki, that's not how you're supposed to pull
fortune sli—wait, hang on!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Shiraoki didn't specify about the number of slips I
could pull... I still have a chance!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: That's the ticket! Give it another shot, Fukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hoooo! One more try!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, the two of them leave with "great
fortune" slips.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now we both get to be happy! Somethin' real
good must be on its way! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Aw shucks. I pulled "great misfortune."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Taiki! Your luck can only get better
from here!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is a message worthy of exaltation! Even in
times of great havoc, your good fortune will
never falter.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru... I can't understand all those difficult
words...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Great misfortune brings great happiness!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Great misfortune brings great happiness?!
Then I'm in luck! Yeehaw!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle looks happy enough... but it doesn't
change the fact her slip has "great misfortune" on
it.
